description_long: This object is a light gray, long-sleeved garment draped over a simple plastic or metal hanger. The hanger features a standard hook at the top, suitable for hanging on rods or hooks in closets or on racks. The garment appears to be a loose-fitting sweater or top, with a slightly cropped hem and relaxed sleeves that gather at the cuffs. The fabric has a soft, matte texture, likely made from cotton or a cotton-blend knit. The hanger itself is thin and unobtrusive, designed to support lightweight clothing items. The overall appearance is clean and minimal, with no visible logos, tags, or embellishments.
description: A light gray, long-sleeved sweater draped over a simple plastic or metal hanger with a standard hook. The garment is loose-fitting and the hanger is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: Back view of the sweater on the hanger, showing the straight hem and relaxed sleeves.
description_view_1: Side profile of the hanger and garment, highlighting the thinness of the hanger and the drape of the fabric.
description_view_2: Front view of the sweater on the hanger, displaying the gathered sleeves and slightly curved hem.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slim hanger and the way the fabric hangs.
